daily_cap.message: You've hit today's Steve limit of {ai_daily_limit} calls. It resets at {resets_at_daily}.

monthly_steve_cap.message: You've used all {steve_uses_per_month} Steve calls for this month. They reset on {resets_at_monthly}.

monthly_whisper_cap.message: You've used all {whisper_minutes_per_month} minutes of voice-note summaries this month. They reset on {resets_at_monthly}.

community_pool_exhausted.message: This community's shared Steve pool is empty for this month. Premium members can still use their personal allowance.

rpm_exceeded.message: You're sending requests too fast — slow down for a moment and try again.

hpm_exceeded.message: You've hit the hourly rate limit. Try again in a little while.

special_technical_cap.message: You've hit a technical safety cap. This protects the platform against runaway usage — it'll clear shortly.

community_suspended.message: This community is currently suspended. Steve features are paused until the community is reinstated.

grace_expired.message: Your Enterprise seat has ended. Subscribe to Premium to keep using Steve.

communities.admin_required: Only community owners or admins can do that.

welcome.sub_intro: This is a sub-space inside **{parent}** — members of {parent} can find their way here.
welcome.tour_intro: A quick tour of what's inside:
welcome.bullets_base:
- **Posts** — share text, photos, videos, audio, links, or polls.
- **Stories** — quick photo/video moments that disappear in 24h.
- **Reactions & replies** — long-press any post to react or reply.
- **Summarise** — tap the **Summarise** button on long threads to get the gist.
- **Key Posts** — pinned highlights live in the *Key Posts* tab so people can find them later.
- **Links & Docs** — every link or document shared here, in one tab.
- **Media** — every photo and video shared here, in one gallery.
welcome.bullet_business_extra: - **Member directory** — see who's in the community.
welcome.bullets_tail:
- **Hide or report** — see something off? Hide it just for you, or report it.
- **Tag me in** — tag **@steve** in any post or reply if you want my take.
welcome.closer: I'm also pinned at the top of your chats — **DM me anytime** for anything.

owner_dm.standard:
Hey {who} — congrats on **{name}**.

I just published a quick welcome post in your feed so people landing here for the first time get the lay of the land. It'll stay in *Key Posts*.

Want a hand getting started? Just tell me — I can help you invite people, set a cover image, write the description, or draft your first post.
owner_dm.late:
Hey {who} — quick one about **{name}**.

I should have done this when you launched, better late than never: I just published a welcome post in your feed so people landing here for the first time get the lay of the land. It'll stay in *Key Posts*.

If you want a hand with cover, description, or first invites, just DM me.

generic.question: Quick one: what brought you here?

professional.question: Quick one: what should this space be useful for first?

fitness.question: Quick one: what are you training for right now?

introduce.title: **👋 Introduce Yourself!**
introduce.lead: New here? Start with a short note.
introduce.bullet_working: - One thing you are working on, curious about, or looking for
introduce.no_bio: No long bio needed. A few lines is enough.
introduce.pinned_closer: I'll keep this thread pinned in *Key Posts* so new members have one clear place to land.

rolling.joined_line: A few people joined this week: {names}.
rolling.new_members: If you are new, drop a note in the **Introduce Yourself** thread when you are ready. Name, reason you joined, and one thing you are looking for is plenty.
rolling.existing_members: If you have been here a while, say hello. Good spaces get built in small replies.
